tracks.title: 🇲🇳 Eternal Sky of the Steppe | Мөнхийн Тэнгэр — Mongolian Throat Singing | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
Хөөмий — the ancient art of Mongolian throat singing echoes across the infinite steppe.

Монгол хөгжим — Энэ хөгжим нь монголын уудам тал нутгийн сүр жавхланг илэрхийлнэ.

Mongolian khoomei (throat singing) is a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage masterpiece. Combined with the haunting tones of the morin khuur (horse-head fiddle), this track evokes the vast emptiness and spiritual depth of the Mongolian steppe.

⏱️ Chapters:
00:00 — Dawn on the Steppe
01:15 — Khoomei Awakens
02:30 — Morin Khuur Solo
03:45 — Nomadic Journey
04:45 — Eternal Sky Outro

🎧 Perfect for: meditation, world music discovery, nature documentaries, spiritual journeys

#Mongolia #ThroatSinging #Khoomei #MorinKhuur #WorldMusic #UNESCO #AIMusic #AssiremMusicProd #NoCopyright #Steppe #NomadicMusic
